mechanism_activation.likely_failure_reason: Benchmark adapter rows did not surface AMMV metadata and retained identical terminal metrics.

example_cases.interpretation: Direct-path mechanism activation only; not benchmark-strength AMV evidence.

mechanism_activation.likely_failure_reason: Held-out smoke preserved terminal outcomes and did not preserve activation or command-source telemetry.

example_cases.interpretation: Slice-local diagnostic boundary; exact causal activation state remains unknown.

claim_boundary: The mechanism_activation block is diagnostic unless tied to benchmark-valid row status, controlled baseline/intervention identity, durable artifacts, and a measured outcome change.
